title: Provide a more explicit error message if a keyword is used as a function input name
body:
The attached file has a simple demo showing the problem code.

I verified that this code compiles without errors using https://www.tutorialspoint.com/compile_verilog_online.php as well as the Efinity built-in verilog compiler.

I have a work-around for icarus by simply changing the input name from "type" to "typ", but this is less than ideal since the source code in question is the output of a third party verilog generator tool.

[test.v.txt](https://github.com/steveicarus/iverilog/files/11007215/test.v.txt)
